prefix_commands.name: log
prefix_commands.purpose: Show moderation case history with button-based pagination.

prefix_commands.name: warn
prefix_commands.purpose: Register warning case and send success/error templates.

prefix_commands.name: mute
prefix_commands.purpose: Apply Discord native communication timeout with authoritative verification and voice disconnect safeguards.

prefix_commands.name: unmute
prefix_commands.purpose: Clear native timeout with authoritative verification.

prefix_commands.name: kick
prefix_commands.purpose: Kick target member and write moderation case log.

prefix_commands.name: jail
prefix_commands.purpose: Apply jail role, snapshot prior roles, and optionally schedule timed release.

prefix_commands.name: unjail
prefix_commands.purpose: Restore pre-jail role snapshot and cancel active jail penalty.

prefix_commands.name: ban
prefix_commands.purpose: Ban user by mention/member/id with authoritative post-action ban verification.

prefix_commands.name: unban
prefix_commands.purpose: Remove guild ban with authoritative absent-check and cache eviction.

prefix_commands.name: yardım
prefix_commands.purpose: Turkish alias mapping to the same help command handler.

prefix_commands.name: embed
prefix_commands.purpose: Start modal/button embed builder flow and send final embed to target text channel.

prefix_commands.name: lock
prefix_commands.purpose: Lock current text channel by denying @everyone SendMessages and neutralizing allows.

prefix_commands.name: unlock
prefix_commands.purpose: Restore channel send-message overwrite snapshot or fallback-unlock path.

prefix_commands.name: durum
prefix_commands.purpose: Show short-lived status embed (CPU, RAM, ping, uptime) to admins.

prefix_commands.name: custom command lookup
prefix_commands.purpose: Fallback response path after builtin moderation command handling.

prefix_commands.name: vcmute / vcunmute
prefix_commands.purpose: Declared as builtin/template names but no runtime handler in moderation command map.

interactions.name: embed builder button
interactions.purpose: Open modal for embed payload entry.

interactions.name: embed builder modal submit
interactions.purpose: Validate payload and send embed to target text channel.

interactions.name: private room button interactions
interactions.purpose: Owner controls: lock/unlock, hide/show, allow/remove lists, transfer, rename, limit, delete.

interactions.name: private room user select interactions
interactions.purpose: Permit/reject member sync and ownership transfer selection.

interactions.name: private room legacy string select
interactions.purpose: Legacy menu path returning deprecation notice.

gateway_events.name: messageCreate
gateway_events.purpose: Entry for prefix moderation and custom command reply flow.

gateway_events.name: messageReactionAdd
gateway_events.purpose: Forward ADD reaction events to reaction action service.

gateway_events.name: messageReactionRemove
gateway_events.purpose: Forward REMOVE reaction events to reaction action service.

gateway_events.name: guildMemberAdd
gateway_events.purpose: Trigger tag-role sync on member join.

gateway_events.name: guildMemberUpdate
gateway_events.purpose: Trigger tag-role sync on member update.

gateway_events.name: userUpdate
gateway_events.purpose: Cross-guild tag-role sync when user profile/primary guild changes.

gateway_events.name: interactionCreate
gateway_events.purpose: Route interactions to embed command or private room service.

gateway_events.name: ready / clientReady
gateway_events.purpose: One-time bootstrap path: cache warmup, presence apply, startup voice auto-join.

schedulers_jobs.name: timed penalty reconcile interval
schedulers_jobs.purpose: Periodically reload and schedule active timed penalties from DB.

schedulers_jobs.name: timed penalty revoke timeouts
schedulers_jobs.purpose: Execute penalty revocation at revoke_at timestamps.

schedulers_jobs.name: private room inactivity cleanup
schedulers_jobs.purpose: Delete empty rooms inactive for >= 3 days.

schedulers_jobs.name: bot presence deferred apply
schedulers_jobs.purpose: Throttle frequent presence updates and apply queued change.

schedulers_jobs.name: startup voice auto-join run
schedulers_jobs.purpose: One-shot post-ready voice connect attempts for configured startup channels.

schedulers_jobs.name: diagnostic listener leak watchers
schedulers_jobs.purpose: Periodic listener count anomaly warnings in DIAG mode.

caches_locks.name: bot instance advisory lock
caches_locks.purpose: Ensure only one active bot gateway process per lock key.

caches_locks.name: moderation rate-limit state
caches_locks.purpose: In-memory rolling action/abuse counters per guild-user-action key.

caches_locks.name: permission service transient caches
caches_locks.purpose: Prevent spam, enforce rate-limit warnings, and serialize execution receipt mutations.

caches_locks.name: target moderation mutation lock
caches_locks.purpose: Serialize concurrent moderation actions per mutation key.

caches_locks.name: guild ban mutation lock + cache coherence
caches_locks.purpose: Serialize ban/unban operations and maintain authoritative guild ban cache behavior.

caches_locks.name: penalty scheduler runtime state
caches_locks.purpose: Avoid duplicate timed revoke execution and track scheduled jobs.

caches_locks.name: reaction rules cache + cooldown + miss cache
caches_locks.purpose: Reduce DB fetch load and enforce per-rule cooldown windows.

caches_locks.name: channel lock snapshots and mutation lock
caches_locks.purpose: Persist/restore send-message overwrite state and serialize channel lock operations.

caches_locks.name: private room runtime caches and locks
caches_locks.purpose: Track room state, serialize ownership/list changes, and enforce access behavior.

caches_locks.name: voice manager operation queue and connection state
caches_locks.purpose: Serialize voice connect/disconnect operations and keep authoritative channel state.

db_backed_durable_state.name: mod_logs
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Moderation case history used by log command and caseId generation.

db_backed_durable_state.name: timed_penalties
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Durable timed penalty schedule with active uniqueness per guild/user/action.

db_backed_durable_state.name: timed_penalty_role_snapshots
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Jail pre-role snapshots used for restore.

db_backed_durable_state.name: reaction_rules
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Rule definitions for reaction automation engine.

db_backed_durable_state.name: reaction_rule_logs
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Execution audit trail for reaction rule processing.

db_backed_durable_state.name: reaction_rule_only_once_executions
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Concurrency/once-only guard state for rule executions.

db_backed_durable_state.name: text_channel_lock_snapshots
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Persist send-message overwrite snapshots for lock/unlock restore.

db_backed_durable_state.name: custom_commands
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Guild custom command storage, mirrored into RAM cache.

db_backed_durable_state.name: custom_command_audit
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Audit trail for custom command changes.

db_backed_durable_state.name: legacy config archives
db_backed_durable_state.purpose: Migrate legacy config tables to archive names and remove live runtime dependency.

external_integrations.name: Discord Gateway + REST
external_integrations.purpose: Primary bot event and action integration surface.

external_integrations.name: Discord Voice transport
external_integrations.purpose: Voice connection management and startup auto-join.

external_integrations.name: PostgreSQL
external_integrations.purpose: Durable storage and startup schema migration backend.

external_integrations.name: Environment loader
external_integrations.purpose: Load runtime configuration from environment variables.

dashboard_required_api_surface.name: auth session
dashboard_required_api_surface.purpose: Route guard and initial dashboard boot.

dashboard_required_api_surface.name: bot presence read
dashboard_required_api_surface.purpose: Load bot presence settings and metadata.

dashboard_required_api_surface.name: settings read
dashboard_required_api_surface.purpose: Load moderation settings payload consumed by dashboard state extractor.

dashboard_required_api_surface.name: reaction rules CRUD + health + dry-run test
dashboard_required_api_surface.purpose: Configure and validate reaction automation rules.

dashboard_required_api_surface.name: embed send
dashboard_required_api_surface.purpose: Send dashboard-defined embed payload to Discord channel.
